name: reimagined_online
savepath: Fixed the visual issues for Torch drops and Comet's missing effects, along with the broken sprite for the Grandfather sword.

Few function Activation
Auto Corpse Recovery-Automatically recovers your corpse upon death, with all items except gold remaining equipped.
Rune drops from the Hellforge will be expanded
Normal-Eth Rune to Hel Rune
Nightmare-Hel Rune to Gul Rune
Hell-Mal Rune to Zod Rune
